impact: Provides a committed, redacted, public-only process-model record with multiple source evidence IDs so the checkbox-37 fixture schema validation has concrete data to validate deterministically.
summary: Add a minimal synthetic public PP&D process fixture for checkbox-38.
target_task: Task checkbox-43: Task checkbox-38: Add the smallest committed synthetic public-process fixture that passes checkbox-37. Use redacted/public-only values and at least two source evidence IDs already represented by existing fixture style.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
